qry:select.name: qry_cabecera
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAMIN:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_saldo
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUM(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totpag) AS n_totpag, SUM(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_montopagado) AS n_montopagado FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ99_RECIBOS, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo WHERE LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado = \'F\' AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa} AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = {#SOURCE:@e_numero_legajo} {%? (#PARAMIN:@l_inicializadas = '0') {% AND ISNOTNULL(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre) %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_pagos
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.d_titulo, TES01_ORD_PAGO.f_pago, TES01_DET_PAGO.n_monto FROM TES01_ORD_PAGO, TES01_DET_PAGO, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN TES01_ORD_PAGO.oi_orden_pago INNER TES01_DET_PAGO.oi_orden_pago, TES01_ORD_PAGO.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo, TES01_DET_PAGO.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo WHERE TES01_ORD_PAGO.l_anulada = \'0\' AND TES01_DET_PAGO.l_anulado = \'0\' AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa} AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = {#SOURCE:@e_numero_legajo} ORDER BY f_pago ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_recibos
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.d_titulo, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_liquidacion, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totpag, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_montopagado FROM LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ99_RECIBOS, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo, LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo WHERE LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado = \'F\' AND LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totpag > 0 AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa} AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = {#SOURCE:@e_numero_legajo} {%? (#PARAMIN:@l_inicializadas = '0') {% AND ISNOTNULL(LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre) %} {% %} %} ORDER BY f_liquidacion ASC ')/ROWS/ROW
